function.arguments: {"requirements":[{"title":"Goodbye endpoint returns JSON farewell","description":"The /goodbye endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a farewell string. The response must have Content-Type application/json and return HTTP 200.","capability_name":"goodbye-endpoint","acceptance_criteria":["GET /goodbye returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json","the JSON response body has a 'message' field whose value is a farewell string"]}]}
